_note: 现任主帅;换帅经 --set 更新(旧任压进 history,只增不改)。下游:match_header 主帅行。
brief: 2025年11月，迪克·艾德沃卡特率库拉索0-0战平牙买加，以不败战绩历史首次晋级世界杯决赛圈。库拉索小组赛将先后对阵德国、厄瓜多尔与科特迪瓦，三队均为首次交手。

issues: 执教生涯历史信息冗余
年龄纪录等趣味信息冗余
荷兰主帅对比信息无关

coach_xverify.discrepancy: Squawka (2 days ago) lists Dean Smith as manager, contradicting all other sources. This appears to be an error, as FIFA.com (official), Concacaf, FourFourTwo, Sports Mole, and Goal.com all confirm Advocaat returned after Rutten's March resignation and will coach at the 2026 World Cup.
